name: Sirolimus
summary: mTOR-inhibiting rapalog tracked for geroscience applications and current older-adult trial activity.
mechanism_summary: Primarily modulates mTOR signaling, with downstream effects on autophagy, nutrient sensing, immune tone, and cellular stress handling.

open_questions: Whether intermittent or low-dose schedules can produce durable functional benefit in older adults
How to balance geroscience dosing against known immunosuppressive and metabolic risks
